title: README staged-spine atlas preview refresh runbook

Operators need the staged-spine primary path documented.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents scripts/refresh_atlas_preview_from_staged_spine.py as primary staged-spine preview refresh path.
Documents fixtures/atlas/atlas_snapshot_staged_spine_preview.json offline reference and parity test.
